sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42812" key="e)rusi/xqwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐρυσί-χθων</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">χθονος</itype>, <sense id="n42812.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tearing up the earth,</tr_> of an ox ploughing, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0507.tlg001:1:19" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Strato Com.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.19</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
